% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID3585.
\tzpentry{ID3585}{Dipole Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3585 introduces Dipole Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{A}_{\text{dipole}}(\vec{r}, t) = \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi} \frac{\vec{\mu}_{\text{eff}}(t) \times (\vec{r} - \vec{r}_{\text{cm}}(t))}{|\vec{r} - \vec{r}_{\text{cm}}(t)|^3} \end{equation}
